data.body:
Just had Italian red meat potato chips from China.

My impressions: They mean like a meaty spaghetti sauce and they do a reasonable job of it. They chose as their model a sweet tomato sauce and you could taste that.

Better chip count in the bag than here but smaller chips. Slightly overcooked […]
